# Background Remover (배경 제거)

> A free, open-source online tool that removes image backgrounds entirely in the browser. No server upload, no sign-up, no ads, no limits. Outputs full-resolution transparent PNG.

Live: https://hanariago.github.io/tool-bg-remover/
Source: https://github.com/hanariago/tool-bg-remover
License: AGPL-3.0

## What it does
- Removes the background from any image and exports a transparent PNG.
- 100% client-side: images are processed in the browser and never sent to any server.
- Unlimited and free — no per-image fees, no resolution caps, no watermark, no login.

## Two modes
- **AI auto**: a local AI segmentation model (@imgly/background-removal, runs in-browser) handles any photo — people, products, complex backgrounds. The model (~40MB) downloads once on first use and is then cached.
- **Solid color (chroma key)**: removes plain/solid backgrounds instantly with no model download. Auto-detects the background color from the image corners; the user can also click to pick a color and adjust strength.

## Key facts
- Privacy: no image ever leaves the device; recent results are stored only in the browser (IndexedDB, last 10).
- Output: PNG with transparency, at the original input resolution.
- Languages: Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese (Simplified), Spanish.
- Tech: vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, hosted on GitHub Pages, no backend.

## Good for
- Removing backgrounds from product photos, portraits, profile pictures, stickers, logos.
- A free, private alternative to remove.bg with unlimited full-resolution downloads.

## FAQ
- **Are photos uploaded to a server?** No — all processing happens in the browser; images are never sent anywhere.
- **AI auto vs. solid-color mode?** AI auto uses a local model for any photo (model downloads once); solid-color removes plain backgrounds instantly with no download.
- **Output format?** Transparent-background PNG at the original resolution.
- **Is it free / any limits?** Completely free, unlimited, no login, no watermark.
- **What works best?** Images where the subject stands out clearly (people, products, logos); AI mode also handles complex backgrounds.
